mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PR_REQUEST WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS IN ('TMP','REQ')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PO_ORDER WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='PC'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM GR_RECEIPT WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='CFM'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RX_RFX WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='OPEN'
SELECT NVL(SUM(TOT_AMT),0) FROM PO_ORDER WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='PC' AND TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')

SELECT R.STS AS CODE, NVL(C.CD_NM_KO, R.STS) AS NAME, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM PR_REQUEST R LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='PR_STS' AND C.CD=R.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE R.DEL_YN='N' GROUP BY R.STS, C.CD_NM_KO ORDER BY R.STS

SELECT O.STS AS CODE, NVL(C.CD_NM_KO, O.STS) AS NAME, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM PO_ORDER O LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='PO_STS' AND C.CD=O.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE O.DEL_YN='N' GROUP BY O.STS, C.CD_NM_KO ORDER BY O.STS

SELECT G.STS AS CODE, NVL(C.CD_NM_KO, G.STS) AS NAME, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM GR_RECEIPT G LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='GR_STS' AND C.CD=G.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE G.DEL_YN='N' GROUP BY G.STS, C.CD_NM_KO ORDER BY G.STS
SELECT NVL(GRADE_CD,'-') AS CODE, NVL(GRADE_NM,'미평가') AS NAME, COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM VD_VENDOR WHERE DEL_YN='N' GROUP BY GRADE_CD, GRADE_NM ORDER BY GRADE_CD NULLS LAST

SELECT YM, AMT FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYYMM') AS YM, SUM(TOT_AMT) AS AMT FROM PO_ORDER WHERE DEL_YN='N' AND STS='PC' AND PO_YMD >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM'), -5) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(PO_YMD,'YYYYMM') ) ORDER BY YM

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT O.ID, O.PO_NO AS DOC_NO, O.PO_TITLE AS TITLE, O.VD_NM AS VD_NM, O.TOT_AMT AS AMT, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, TO_CHAR(O.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM PO_ORDER O LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='PO_STS' AND C.CD=O.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE O.DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY O.ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT G.ID, G.GR_NO AS DOC_NO, G.PO_NO AS TITLE, G.VD_NM AS VD_NM, G.TOT_AMT AS AMT, C.CD_NM_KO AS STS_NM, TO_CHAR(G.REG_DT,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DT FROM GR_RECEIPT G LEFT JOIN CM_CODE C ON C.GRP_CD='GR_STS' AND C.CD=G.STS AND C.DEL_YN='N' WHERE G.DEL_YN='N' ORDER BY G.ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
